case_title: ZEDO, INC. VS. VIDEOLOGY MEDIA TECHNOLOGIES, BV ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSED PER 6-6-2018 ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VIDEOLOGY MEDIA TECHNOLOGIES BV'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION FOR INCONVENIENT FORUM IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action For Inconvenient Forum
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Videology Media Technologies BV's motion to dismiss action for inconvenient forum is granted. No opposition filed. The case is dismissed per the mandatory forum selection clause. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
